title: Expose IsReadOnly and EditableFields from platform config response
body:
## Context

The `PlatformConfigClient.FetchConfig()` method receives `ProductConfigResponse` which includes:
- `IsReadOnly` - whether the config is read-only for the user's tier
- `EditableFields` - which fields the user can modify

Currently these fields are logged but not returned to callers.

## Problem

Downstream logic (like `FetchAndMerge`) cannot enforce platform-mandated restrictions such as:
- Preventing local configuration overrides when `is_read_only=true`
- Only merging editable fields when the platform restricts configurability

## Proposed Solution

Options:
1. Update `FetchConfig` return signature to include this metadata
2. Add metadata to the `Config` struct itself
3. Return a wrapper struct with Config + metadata

## Files

- `internal/config/platform.go` - FetchConfig, FetchAndMerge
- `internal/config/types.go` - Config struct (if adding fields there)

## Source

Code review finding on PR #321
